scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "PORT=3100 npm run dev --workspace=packages/server" "wait-on tcp:3100 && npm run dev --workspace=packages/client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/server && npm run build --workspace=packages/client
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=packages/server && npm run test --workspace=packages/client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=packages/server && npm run lint --workspace=packages/client
